details: The agent successfully navigated to the Python Wikipedia article, found the stable release version (3.14.3) in the infobox, identified the Python Software Foundation as the developer, and navigated to the PSF article (directly after a failed click attempt). The agent correctly reported the formation date as March 6, 2001, which matches the known fact. The click technically failed but the agent recovered by navigating directly to the PSF page, and all required information was correctly retrieved and reported.
